calendar.matters:
Petition For Termination Of Trust And Distribution Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Dec-14-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amy L. Hespenheide, via Zoom, for Diane V. Raike, Petitioner.

Upon query by the court regarding the statement in the instant petition that "Petitioner holds a presently exercisable general power of appointment", counsel offers oral argument to supplement her position, mentioning Probate Codes 612 and 15404 in advocacy. The court acknowledges the papers submitted but advises that it is not convinced by the legal basis provided. Counsel offers additional advocacy on behalf of the instant petition.

After additional discussion, the court takes the matter under submission. Counsel is advised that she will be contacted by the court if a supplement is required.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Petition For Termination Of Trust And Distribution Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Nov-09-2022 Continued To Dec-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
